_comment: Score floors — minimum acceptable scores per track. Update after each validated improvement run using: python tools/update_score_floor.py --track <track> --score <score>. Do not lower floors without team review.

sloop.notes: Baseline after target_lane=center fix (+38% lat RMSE improvement)

hill_highway.notes: Floor raised to 92.0 after EMA regression detected (2026-03-21). Best validated score: 92.3 (2026-03-20). Floor at 92.0 gives 0.3pt headroom while catching regressions like the 91.7 EMA run.
